name.description: The public name of the membership tier (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum).

level.description: A numeric rank for sorting tiers, e.g., 1 for Bronze, 2 for Silver. Higher is better.

minPoints.description: The minimum number of points required to achieve this tier.

description.description: A short, user-facing description of the tier and its core value.

benefits.description: A list of benefits or perks associated with this tier.

iconUrl.description: URL to a badge or icon representing the tier.
